arts.ttl: Slot given two-game ban for red card at Everton
arts.sum: Liverpool manager Arne Slot is given a two-game touchline ban following his red card against Everton this month.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot banned for abusing referee Michael Oliver after Liverpool’s chaotic derby win over Everton
arts.sum: Liverpool manager Arne Slot has been banned for two games after being sent off at the end of the Merseyside derby.

arts.ttl: Brentford's Cochrane joins Tuchel's England staff
arts.sum: Brentford coach Justin Cochrane has become the final member of Thomas Tuchel's newly formed England coaching staff, the Football Association confirmed.

arts.ttl: Thomas Tuchel completes England coaching staff with key appointment from Brentford
arts.sum: Justin Cochrane will take on a role in addition to his duties with Thomas Frank’s side

arts.ttl: 'I wasn't happy' - Jake O'Brien reveals tense Sean Dyche talks after Everton transfer frustration
arts.sum: Jake O'Brien was speaking following Everton's 2-2 Premier League draw with Manchester United

arts.ttl: Beto photo revelation telling as Everton transformation much more than just goals
arts.sum: Beto isn't just scoring more goals for Everton under David Moyes, his style of play has also changed

arts.ttl: David Moyes isn't trying to change Jake O'Brien as Everton boss issues Dwight McNeil injury update
arts.sum: David Moyes has addressed Jake O'Brien's breakthrough, Dwight McNeil's fitness and new contracts ahead of Everton's trip to Brentford

arts.ttl: Brentford vs Everton: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Brentford host Everton in the Premier League on Tuesday night. Preview includes team news, predicted lineups, how to watch on TV and more.

arts.ttl: Brentford vs. Everton: Bees out to achieve first-time feat in Premier League home clash
arts.sum: Brentford will be looking to achieve something for the first time in their Premier League history when they welcome Everton to the Gtech Community Stadium for Wednesday's Premier League clash.

arts.ttl: 'Huge priority': Alan Shearer says David Moyes isn't 'naive enough' to say no to one signing at Everton
arts.sum: Alan Shearer thinks this signing is a "huge priority" for Everton 💰
